JUDGE WICK; BETH WILBER - CLERK; LORRETA NAJARO - REPORTER 2:20PM, C/C FOR SETT. CONF; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; STIP J. ON THE RECORD; PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCLEAN, CATHERINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 755 BUSH ST, #200 $1,074.74 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,674.74, LEASE FORFEITED, $600 REFLECTS COSTS & ATTY. FEES; IF DEFT. TENDERS ALL PAYMENTS PLTF. SHALL SET ASIDE JUDGMENT & DISMISS ACTION, & DEFT. SHALL BE ENTITLED TO RESUME OCCUPANCY; NO FURTHER STAYS; SEE FILE FOR PAYMENT SCHEDULE & DETAILS.
